name: Side-tab accent border
description: Thick colored border on one side of a card or tab. Review whether the accent is necessary or should be replaced with a quieter full-surface treatment.

name: Layout property animation

name: Flat type hierarchy
description: The Wi-Fi page uses several closely spaced text sizes. Validate the hierarchy visually before deciding whether to change it.
